demo_fitness.tagline: Fitness that fits your life, not the other way around
demo_fitness.what_they_do: PeakForm is a boutique fitness studio in Austin, TX offering 1:1 personal training, group HIIT classes, and nutrition coaching. We specialize in people who've tried gyms before and quit — and we know exactly why they quit and how to fix it.

products_services.name: 1:1 Personal Training
products_services.description: Your own trainer, your own program, your schedule. We start with a 60-minute assessment to understand your history, injuries, lifestyle, and goals. Then build a plan that accounts for all of it. Sessions are 45-60 min, 2-3x/week. Most clients see measurable results in 6 weeks.
products_services.best_for: People who've failed with generic programs and need accountability + a plan built for their exact body and schedule
products_services.outcome: Average client loses 14lbs or adds 22lbs of lean muscle in 90 days

products_services.name: Group HIIT Classes
products_services.description: High-energy 45-minute classes running 6am to 8pm, 7 days a week. Every class has a coach on the floor — not just at the front. Beginner modifications built into every movement. No one gets left behind. Community of 200+ members who actually show up for each other.
products_services.best_for: People who want structure, energy, and community without the cost of personal training
products_services.outcome: Members who attend 3x/week report feeling 'like a different person' within 30 days

products_services.name: Nutrition Coaching
products_services.description: 12 weeks, one coach, weekly check-ins. We don't give you a meal plan — we change how you think about food. Built around your real life: travel schedule, family dinners, stress eating patterns. Most clients stop thinking about food as the enemy by week 4.
products_services.best_for: People who exercise consistently but can't crack the nutrition side — the missing piece
products_services.outcome: 87% of clients maintain results 6 months after completing the program

products_services.name: Recovery & Mobility
products_services.description: 60-minute guided sessions combining stretching, foam rolling, and breathwork. Open to non-members. Designed for desk workers with chronic tightness, athletes managing overuse, and anyone coming back from injury. Your body will feel different after the first session.
products_services.best_for: Athletes, desk workers, and post-injury clients who need to move better before they can train harder
products_services.outcome: Most clients eliminate chronic back or hip pain within 4 sessions

key_benefits: No long-term contracts — month to month, cancel anytime
Free 30-minute intro session before you commit to anything
Results guarantee — measurable progress in 90 days or your money back
14 coaches on staff — you'll never get a substitute you don't know
Average Google rating: 4.9 stars across 340+ reviews

testimonials.name: Sarah M., 42
testimonials.result: Lost 28lbs in 4 months. I'd tried 6 gyms before PeakForm. The difference is they actually care whether you show up.

testimonials.name: James K., 38
testimonials.result: Came in post-ACL surgery. Back to playing recreational soccer in 5 months. The recovery program is the real deal.

testimonials.name: Priya T., 35
testimonials.result: I travel 3 weeks a month for work. They built me a program I can do in any hotel gym. First trainer who understood my actual life.

demo_fitness.owner_context: Most customers come because they failed at other gyms. Top question: 'I haven't worked out in years, is this right for me?' Most popular: 1:1 training. Second: people who exercise but can't fix their nutrition.

visitor_questions.journey_framing: Tell us where you're starting from — we'll show you exactly what fits.

questions.text: How would you describe your fitness right now?
questions.purpose: Identifies starting point and service fit
options: Haven't worked out properly in a while
I exercise sometimes but inconsistently
Active but stuck — not seeing results
Returning after injury or health issue

questions.text: What's the main thing you want to change?
options: Lose weight and feel better in my body
Build real strength and fitness
Fix my eating — exercise isn't the problem
Recover and move without pain

questions.text: What's held you back before? Be honest — no judgment.

demo_saas.tagline: Close deals faster with less admin
demo_saas.what_they_do: Flowdesk is a CRM and sales automation platform for small and mid-size businesses. We replace spreadsheets and missed follow-ups with one system that runs your pipeline automatically. Average customer closes 31% more deals within 90 days of switching.

products_services.name: Flowdesk Starter
products_services.description: Full CRM built for one person. Contact management, visual pipeline, automated follow-up sequences, and meeting booking — all in one place. Set up in 30 minutes. Imports from any spreadsheet or existing CRM automatically. Used by 4,000+ solo operators who finally have a system.
products_services.best_for: Freelancers and solo founders who are losing deals because leads fall through the cracks
products_services.outcome: Solo users recover an average of 8 deals/month they would have lost to forgotten follow-ups

products_services.name: Flowdesk Team
products_services.description: Everything in Starter plus shared pipeline views, team inbox, deal collaboration, and manager dashboards. See every deal your team is working, who said what, and what's stuck — in one screen. No more 'what's the status on X?' in Slack. Onboarding your team takes one afternoon.
products_services.best_for: Sales teams of 2-20 who have no visibility into each other's pipelines and spend too much time on status updates
products_services.outcome: Teams report saving 6+ hours/week on status meetings and internal updates

products_services.name: Flowdesk Automate
products_services.description: AI-powered follow-up sequences that run 24/7. Lead scoring that tells you who to call today. Meeting booking that works while you sleep. Connects to Gmail, Outlook, LinkedIn, and Zapier. Set it up once — it runs your outbound from there. Not a robot: sequences sound like you, not a template.
products_services.best_for: Teams who want to scale outreach without hiring another SDR
products_services.outcome: Teams using Automate see 2.4x more booked meetings from the same lead volume

products_services.name: Done-For-You Setup
products_services.description: Our team migrates your data, builds your pipeline stages, sets up your sequences, and trains your team — in one week. We've done this for 500+ companies switching from Salesforce and HubSpot. You show up Monday, your team is already running in Flowdesk by Friday.
products_services.best_for: Teams switching from Salesforce or HubSpot who don't have time for a 3-month implementation
products_services.outcome: Average switch completed in 4.2 days with zero data loss

key_benefits: Setup in 30 minutes — not 3 months like Salesforce
Free migration from any CRM — we do it for you
14-day free trial, no credit card required
Average customer closes 31% more deals in 90 days
SOC 2 Type II certified — enterprise-grade security

testimonials.name: Daniela R., Founder @ Rowan Consulting
testimonials.result: Switched from HubSpot. Setup took one afternoon. We closed $140K in deals the first month that I'm pretty sure we would have lost in HubSpot.

testimonials.name: Marcus T., VP Sales @ Brightline
testimonials.result: Team of 8. We were using 3 tools before — Flowdesk replaced all of them. Pipeline visibility went from zero to everything in one screen.

testimonials.name: Aisha K., Solo consultant
testimonials.result: I was losing track of leads in a spreadsheet. Flowdesk's automated follow-ups now run while I sleep. I've added $6K MRR in 60 days.

demo_saas.owner_context: Most people come frustrated with Salesforce complexity or spreadsheet chaos. Top question: 'How long does setup take?' Most popular: Team plan. Best customer: 5-15 person team, founder is still doing sales, growing fast.

visitor_questions.journey_framing: Two questions to understand your situation — then we'll show you exactly how Flowdesk fits.

questions.text: How are you managing your pipeline right now?
questions.purpose: Identifies current pain and switching intent
options: Spreadsheets — it's getting messy
Salesforce or HubSpot — too complex
Nothing formal — it's in my head
Another CRM that isn't working

questions.text: What's the biggest problem you're trying to solve?
options: Leads falling through the cracks
My team has no pipeline visibility
Too much time on manual follow-up
I need to close more deals, faster

questions.text: How big is your sales team, and what are you trying to achieve in the next 90 days?

demo_agency.tagline: Brand and design for businesses that mean something
demo_agency.what_they_do: Kindred Creative is a boutique brand and design agency working with purpose-driven founders and small businesses. We do brand strategy, visual identity, websites, and copy. We've helped 80+ businesses go from 'I'm embarrassed to send people to my website' to 'this finally looks like us.'
target_customers: 2-5 year businesses that have outgrown their DIY brand
Service businesses ready for a rebrand

products_services.name: Brand Foundation
products_services.description: A 3-week brand strategy and identity sprint. We start with a 2-hour discovery session, then deliver: brand positioning, messaging framework, visual identity (logo system, colors, typography), and a brand guide you can hand to any designer or copywriter. Everything is yours — all files, all source docs, no monthly retainer.
products_services.best_for: Businesses launching or rebranding who need a clear, consistent identity they can build everything else on
products_services.outcome: Clients report 40% faster sales cycles after rebranding — 'people get it immediately now'

products_services.name: Website Design & Build
products_services.description: Custom Webflow or Squarespace site. Strategy-first: we start with your positioning and conversion goals, not templates. SEO-ready, mobile-perfect, and editable by your team after launch — you'll never need to call us to change a word. Average project: 6-8 weeks from kickoff to live.
products_services.best_for: Businesses whose website no longer reflects who they are or who they serve
products_services.outcome: Average 60% increase in contact form submissions within 60 days of launch

products_services.name: Brand Copywriting
products_services.description: Website copy, brand story, pitch deck narrative, email sequences. We interview you for 90 minutes, then write in your voice — not corporate, not generic. The test: you should be able to read every word aloud and it sounds like you said it. Includes 2 rounds of revisions.
products_services.best_for: Founders who know what they want to say but can't make it land on paper
products_services.outcome: Clients close 30% more inbound inquiries after copy refresh — 'people already understand the value before we speak'

products_services.name: Brand Refresh
products_services.description: You have a brand but it's dated or inconsistent. We modernize without losing what works: refine the logo, update colors and typography, create missing assets (social templates, pitch deck, proposal template). Done in 2 weeks. You keep your brand equity, lose the embarrassment.
products_services.best_for: Established businesses that have outgrown their current look but don't need a full rebrand
products_services.outcome: Most clients say their team starts using brand assets consistently for the first time

key_benefits: Fixed pricing — no surprise invoices, ever
You own everything — all source files delivered at project end
Free 45-minute brand clarity call before any commitment
No retainer required — we work project by project

testimonials.name: Tobi A., Founder @ Clearpath Finance
testimonials.result: I was embarrassed to send investors to my website. 6 weeks later I had a brand I was proud of. Closed my seed round 3 weeks after launch.

testimonials.name: Carmen L., Executive Director @ Roots Collective
testimonials.result: As a nonprofit we were skeptical about the investment. Kindred delivered a brand that finally matched our impact. Donations up 34% in the year after launch.

testimonials.name: Ryan C., Solo consultant
testimonials.result: The copywriting project alone paid for itself. My close rate on discovery calls went from 40% to 68% — people finally understand what I do before we even speak.

demo_agency.tone: warm, thoughtful, direct — confident but never arrogant
demo_agency.cta_primary: Book a free brand clarity call
demo_agency.owner_context: Most clients come because they're embarrassed by their website or brand doesn't match their work quality. Most common question: 'How long does it take?' Best client: solo founder or small team, 2-5 years in business, outgrown their DIY brand.

visitor_questions.journey_framing: Help us understand where you are — we'll show you the fastest path to a brand that works.

questions.purpose: Identifies brand maturity and service fit
options: Starting from scratch — launching something new
Have a brand but I've outgrown it
Brand is fine, website is the problem
Need help turning my ideas into words

questions.text: What made you start looking for help?
options: I'm embarrassed to send people to my site
A big opportunity is coming and I'm not ready
My brand doesn't reflect my actual quality
I'm pivoting and need a fresh start

questions.text: Tell us about your business and what you're trying to communicate.
